message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam packageBorderThickness 2
skinparam packageTitleFontStyle bold
skinparam packageTitleFontSize 22
skinparam packageTitleAlignment left

skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F7FBEA
  BorderColor #7FBF7F
  FontColor #0B4F6C
  FontSize 22
  BorderThickness 1
}

skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #F7FBEA
  BorderColor #0B4F6C
  FontSize 22
}

' --- Packages ---
package "OpenAI-Baseline" as PBaseline {
  class "RLImplementation" as RLImplementation
}

package "OpenAI-Gym" as PGym {
  note as GymNote
  GymNote : Generic interface between RL\nalgorithms and simulation\nenvironments

  class "Env" as Env
}

package "atc-reinforcement-learning" as PATC {
  class "AtcGym" as AtcGym
  class "Airspace" as Airspace
  class "Runway" as Runway
  class "Airplane" as Airplane
  class "SimParameters" as SimParameters
  class "Corridor" as Corridor
  class "MinimumVectoringAltitude" as MinimumVectoringAltitude
}

' --- Relationships ---
RLImplementation --> Env

GymNote ..> Env

AtcGym -|> Env

AtcGym *-- Airspace
AtcGym *-- SimParameters
AtcGym *-- "many" Airplane : 1

Airspace *-- Runway
Runway *-- Corridor
Airspace *-- "many" MinimumVectoringAltitude : 1

Airplane --> SimParameters

' --- Layout hints ---
RLImplementation -[hidden]down- Env
Env -[hidden]down- AtcGym
Airspace -[hidden]right- Runway
Runway -[hidden]right- Airplane
MinimumVectoringAltitude -[hidden]right- Corridor
Corridor -[hidden]right- SimParameters
@enduml
```
